creator: mons@cpan.org
text:
Of course, approved

On Monday 27 April 2009 12:20:23 Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/p5-ex-lib,
>
> Please note that PR ports/134040 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/134040
